seed_demodb.py, setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py all reference demodb

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on demodb, a synthetic database seeded via OrientDB's REST API. Three real hotel chains are targeted for deletion: Copacabana Palace (Historic, Rio de Janeiro, Brazil; actual coordinates -22.9676, -43.1790; seed coordinates -22.9683, -43.1842), Park Hyatt Tokyo (Luxury, Tokyo, Japan; address 3-7-1-2 Nishi Shinjuku; phone +81-3-5322-1234), and Four Seasons Sydney (Luxury, Sydney, Australia; address 199 George Street; phone +61-2-9250-3100). Two survivor hotels must remain intact: Hotel Artemide (Boutique, Rome, Italy; 4-star) and The Savoy (Luxury, London, United Kingdom; 5-star on the Strand). All hotel data uses real hotel names, real addresses, real phone numbers, and verified geographic coordinates. The database contains 15 hotels total, seeded by seed_demodb.py with HasStayed and HasReview edges connecting profiles to hotels. The task requires using DELETE VERTEX command to ensure proper cascading deletion of related edges.
